esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Lock timeouts: queries giving up waiting for locks
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_timeouts = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.lock.timeout.rate),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_timeouts > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_timeouts
